# Clay Duncan

## About

Clay Duncan is a Huntsville, Alabama mortgage loan originator at Princeton Mortgage, specializing in VA loans for Redstone Arsenal and the Huntsville military community, AI education and training for REALTORS®, and loan officer growth leadership. Clay helps homebuyers make confident mortgage decisions, helps real estate professionals use AI in useful ways, and helps loan officers evaluate growth opportunities.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://www.clayduncan.com/
- Phone: 256.203.4500
- Email: clay@princetonmortgage.com
- Company: Princeton Mortgage
- NMLS: 118739
- NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/INDIVIDUAL/118739

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theclayduncan/
